case_title: DAVID MAST VS. MARIA SANDOVAL MELENDREZ et al

MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-20-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST WILLIAM C. JOHNSON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-05-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-20-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARGARET DEL COTO, CSR#8493. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-05-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2003 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE UNINSURED MOTORIST DESIGNATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
